item.title: First Step Solver
item.description: Complete your very first Slant puzzle in any mode and begin your logical journey.

item.title: Daily Challenger
item.description: Finish your first daily challenge and join the global Slant leaderboard experience.

item.title: Daily Rookie
item.description: Complete 5 daily challenges and start building a consistent puzzle-solving habit.

item.title: Daily Veteran
item.description: Complete 20 daily challenges and prove your long-term dedication to Slant puzzles.

item.title: Daily Master
item.description: Complete 100 daily challenges and become a true master of consistent logical reasoning.

item.title: Practice Starter
item.description: Finish 10 practice puzzles and get comfortable with Slant game mechanics and patterns.

item.title: Easy Explorer
item.description: Complete 10 easy puzzles and build confidence with fundamental Slant strategies.

item.title: Medium Mind
item.description: Solve 10 medium puzzles and demonstrate solid intermediate logical thinking skills.

item.title: Hard Thinker
item.description: Conquer 10 hard puzzles and push your logical reasoning to advanced levels.

item.title: Slant Enthusiast
item.description: Complete 50 total puzzles in any mode and show true passion for Slant challenges.

item.title: Grid Walker
item.description: Reach 200 total completed games and become a veteran of Slant grid navigation.

item.title: Streak Builder
item.description: Maintain a 3-day daily challenge streak and build your solving consistency.

item.title: Streak Keeper
item.description: Maintain a 7-day daily challenge streak and strengthen your daily puzzle habit.

item.title: c
item.description: Maintain a 30-day streak in daily challenges and achieve legendary consistency.
